projectDescription: An integration platform for developers that lets you connect APIs and build event-driven automations using pre-built components or custom Node.js, Python, Go, and Bash code.
keyFeatures: 2,800+ pre-built app integrations and 10,000+ component actions
Event-driven workflow automation triggered by HTTP, timers, and third-party app events
Custom code support in Node.js, Python, Go, and Bash
Pipedream Connect: embed auth and actions into your own product via SDK
MCP Server: expose 10,000+ tools to AI agents via Model Context Protocol
Pre-built event sources for GitHub, Slack, Airtable, RSS, and thousands more
Destinations for async delivery to S3, Snowflake, HTTP, email, and SSE
Free tier with generous limits for individual developers
publicApiSurface: createBackendClient(opts: BackendClientOpts) — server-side Pipedream Connect client
BackendClient.createConnectToken(opts: ConnectTokenCreateOpts) — create a Connect token for external users
BackendClient.getAccountById(accountId, params) — retrieve a connected account
BackendClient.deleteExternalUser(externalId) — delete all accounts for an external user
BackendClient.getProjectInfo() — retrieve project apps and info
BackendClient.makeProxyRequest(proxyOptions, targetRequest) — proxy API requests through Pipedream
ComponentFormContainer — React component for embedding app connection forms
FrontendClientProvider — React context provider for the frontend client
useAccounts() — React hook to list connected accounts
useApps() — React hook to list and filter available Pipedream apps
useComponent() / useComponents() — React hooks to retrieve actions and triggers
REST API: GET /v1/sources — list event sources
REST API: POST /v1/connect/tokens — create a Connect token
SSE stream: /v1/sse — real-time event stream from sources
